name: Low-Calorie Turkey-Spinach Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 30 oz Frozen chopped spinach (3 boxes or 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the spinach and squeeze out any excess liquid.
2. Place about one-third of the spinach at the bottom of a lightly oiled casserole dish.
3. Spread half of the ricotta over the spinach.
4. Sprinkle half of the turkey evenly on top.
5. Spoon half of the spaghetti sauce over the turkey.
6. Cover with half of the mozzarella slices.
7. Repeat steps 2-5 with the remaining ingredients, ending with a final layer of spinach and Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
